Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Oct-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Vijay Desai, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Fortis Capital, LLC

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Motion for order that requests for admissions be deemed admitted and for monetary sanctions granted. The matters set forth in plaintiff's requests for admissions, set one, are deemed admitted. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
